broker_info.description: Returns the broker's name, version, uptime, host, port, TLS status, and configured URL paths.

providers_list.description: Returns every provider slot known to the broker (connected and disconnected), with transport kind, client count, and pending request count.

provider_status.description: Returns the status of one provider slot identified by name. Errors if the slot does not exist.

broker://info.name: Broker info
broker://info.description: Broker identity, version, uptime, and listening configuration.

broker://providers.name: Broker providers
broker://providers.description: List of every provider slot known to the broker, including disconnected ones.

broker://providers/{name}.name: Broker provider
broker://providers/{name}.description: Snapshot of one specific provider slot, addressed by its name.
